perf_comparison.note: p95/long-task gate is evaluated against artifacts/perf-theme-baseline.json; task before capture is included for transparency.

checks.targeted_photo_test: npm.cmd run test:e2e -- --workers=1 --grep "renders every WebP photo" => passed
checks.canary_repeat: npm.cmd run test:e2e -- --workers=1 --grep "applies derived background|keeps drag|keeps select-mode|keeps widget resize|restores widget tools|commits widget runtime|clears stale conditional|keeps widget runtime|keeps ordered drag|absorbs a workspace widget|ordered grid item" --repeat-each=10 => 110 passed
checks.perf_theme: npm.cmd run test:perf:theme -- --workers=1 => passed; comparison artifact passed=true

notes: WebP conversion used Pillow as a one-time tool; no runtime dependency was added.
Predecode attempts image.decode/load and fails open after 1000ms so background switching cannot hang.
Photo backgrounds and solar-system sequence now reference .webp; old .jpg assets are removed.
